caption: In a room with tan brick walls, a man and several children are gathered around a large, blue rectangular storage chest. The man, wearing a light-colored button-down shirt and khaki trousers, stands with his back to the viewer, leaning over the chest. Several children, wearing matching tan shirts, sit on the floor around the chest; some are positioned to the left and others to the right. In the background, there is a black television screen and white shelving units filled with books and materials. The caption "These children will help the Congo." is displayed at the bottom of the scene. Across the sequence of frames, there is very little movement, though the man shifts his weight slightly while remaining focused on the contents of the blue chest. The overall composition and the positions of the people and objects remain consistent throughout the clip.
